# LOMDeviceRequestCommand.Command

**Device Management Command**

The command to send requests to a device using lights-out management (LOM).

## Declaration

```swift
object LOMDeviceRequestCommand.Command
```

## Objects

- **LOMDeviceRequestCommand.Command.RequestListItem**: A dictionary that contains a requested action to perform on a device using lights-out management (LOM).
